programme.desc: The paper review that won't put you to sleep (like the others). Join the all-star comedy cast for an intelligent and insightful look at tomorrow's headlines tonight. Hosts Simon Evans, Andrew Doyle and Leo Kearse.

programme.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Replay
programme.desc: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

programme.title: No ball games: life and play through the eyes of children across the UK
programme.desc: Celebrating the imagination and resourcefulness of young children across the UK by understanding the outdoor games they invent, inherit and play. The documentary was shot before Covid-19 changed their lives, and shifts from rural Wales to post-industrial Teesside and inner-city London. What challenges will these young people face in the aftermath of brutal funding cuts to youth services? How can their optimistic energy strengthen their resilience in these challenging times?

programme.title: My life in a hotel room: Ireland's hidden homeless crisis
programme.desc: Nuala and her teenage daughter, Laura, were suddenly evicted from their Dublin home when their landlord of 10 years was forced to sell by his creditors. They haven't been able to find a new place to rent. Despite having been on the council house waiting list for more than six years they are still only around 600th in line. Now, like almost 10,000 other people and 1,700 families across Ireland, Nuala and Laura are homeless..

programme.title: Scars
programme.desc: Scars are not just skin deep - emotional and psychological histories lie beneath the healed wounds. In this documentary, we meet 5 different people for whom their scars changed forever how they see the world, and how the world sees them. Their scars are the result of war, self harm, birth defect, cancer and domestic violence which are a collection of stories both extraordinary and every day. These scars bear witness to our lived experience of love, loss, strength and overcoming the odds

programme.title: How a conference call sparked America's abortion obsession | The Daphne Project
programme.desc: How a conference call sparked America's abortion obsession | The Daphne Project: 'Journalism was her life': Daphne Caruana Galizia's family speak out

programme.title: Buyers Club
programme.desc: In 2013, a cure was found for hepatitis C. It could save millions of lives, but its price tag of between $40,000 and $84,000 for 84 pills puts it far out of most patients' reach. However, in India, a generic version of the drug is available for less than $1,000. Denied the affordable medication he needed, Greg Jefferys defied the US pharmaceutical company that holds the patent to set up a worldwide supply network for the generic version.

programme.title: The Native American kids who get $200k for graduating
programme.desc: The Ho-Chunk Nation are a Native American tribe that owns a string of casinos across Wisconsin. Ho Chunk children get a share of casino profits once they've graduated and turned 18. It's called their 18 Money. When they finish high school, they get given $200,000. Journalist and film-maker Jenny Kleeman meets the Ho Chunk kids of Black River Falls high school and their families as they graduate, along with tribal representatives and residents of Black River Falls, Wisconsin.

programme.title: I came out as HIV positive to break down stigma | Staged Sex: Role of the Intimacy Co-Ordinator
programme.desc: Labour MP Lloyd Russell-Moyle came out as HIV positive in a speech in the House of Commons. He tells the Guardian's Owen Jones his diagnosis initially left him feeling like his insides had been ripped out but those fears gradually washed away and he has been able to live his life. He says he hopes his announcement can help break the stigma around HIV and help other people. | The role of the intimacy coordinator has become more important in the wake of the Harvey Weinstein allegations and the broader #MeToo movement. Ita O'Brien works on the set of a short film, Keep Breathing, breaking down the choreography of a sex scene to ensure the wellbeing of the actors and create a clear language and process.

programme.title: On the road
programme.desc: Hundreds of women operate as sex workers along the Strada Bonifica, the ironically named ‘road of love' on the Adriatic coast of Italy. There has been a huge increase in the number of Nigerian women working along the 10-mile stretch of road – some of whom have been trafficked into the country and forced into prostitution. The film moves between the women's stories, the Italians who live and work there and the local NGO, named On the Road, attempting to support the women

programme.title: The quest for the perfect male six-packs | Guantánamo Diary
programme.desc: Steroids, syringes and stigma: the quest for the perfect male six-packs | Guantánamo Diary: rendition, torture and detention without charge

programme.title: The foreign domestic staff living a life of five-star serfdom in London | Isis has my kids
programme.desc: I was just a slave: the foreign domestic staff living a life of five-star serfdom in London | Isis has my kids: I won't stop till I get them home to the US

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: The valley rebels
programme.desc: Cédric Herrou is a farmer who supports and houses African refugees in the alpine village of Breil-Sur-Roya in southern France. Some regard him as a heroic good samaritan, but others – including the French border police and state prosecutor – denounce him as the leader of a band of smugglers, bringing migrants from Italy into France while flouting official border controls. As Cedric moves from one prosecution to another, why do he and his fellow activists feel compelled to defy the authorities?

programme.title: The Circle: masculinity, racism and brotherhood on a Hackney estate
programme.desc: Two brothers living on a council estate in Hackney, east London, express their experiences of masculinity, racism and brotherhood through dance and direct testimony. Revealing interviews are set against dynamic movement sequences, communicating their histories and emotions in a way that words alone could not. This imaginative film explores experiences of anxiety and depression while uncovering love and vulnerability in a close-knit community

programme.title: 'Revenge pornography': Chrissy Chambers' search for justice
programme.desc: In April, it became a crime in England and Wales to post ‘revenge pornography'. Chrissy Chambers and her girlfriend Bria are YouTube's most popular lesbian content creators. The two channels they run have almost half a million subscribers. But before Chrissy came out, she had a boyfriend. He also has videos of her. And she says he's using them to destroy her

programme.title: Lives Instead of Knives': one woman's struggle to end knife crime
programme.desc: Smith's Farm Estate in Northolt, north-west London, has been the scene of multiple stabbings. After one murder came particularly close to home, community volunteer Jen Lock began a one-woman mission to end knife crime in the area. But, as she finds out, things don't always go smoothly.

programme.title: The teenager left paralysed by 'one tiny mistake' | Living with disabilities under austerity: 'You're treated worse than a farm animal'
programme.desc: Anna White was 15 when she had her appendix removed at the Royal Albert Edward infirmary in Wigan, Greater Manchester. The surgery appeared to go well, but in recovery she suffered a cardiac arrest and stopped breathing. | Alex has complex physical and mental health needs, and cannot walk unaided. But due to a severe lack of accessible housing in the area, Alex has to live in a first-floor flat.

programme.title: World Cup Slaves
programme.desc: Nepalese men employed in Qatar's construction industry tell Robert Booth how they work for little or no pay as they build the infrastructure ahead of the 2022 football World Cup. Appalling living conditions and unsafe employment are not the only difficulties they face: there is pressure and disbelief from families in Nepal when no money is sent back home

programme.title: Finding Ashley | Murder, corruption and cattle barons in Kenya
programme.desc: Finding Ashley: a Native American family's desperate search for their missing relative | Murder, corruption and cattle barons in Kenya

programme.title: From California gang to Mexican vigilante | The final interview with a legendary journalist
programme.desc: From California gang to Mexican vigilante: the family man fighting the drug cartels in Mexico | Murdered in Mexico: the final interview with a legendary journalist

programme.title: Born To Kill?
programme.desc: A look at the realNatural Born Killers', Charles Starkweather and Caril Ann Fugate.

programme.title: Deadly Dates
programme.desc: In 2007, schoolgirl Carly Ryan is found dead in Horseshoe Bay, Adelaide. Detectives hunt down a serial paedophile who hid behind fake online personas.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: Peña plans another secret operation to topple a member of the Cali cartel but may run out of time while looking for him.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: David seeks revenge on behalf of his father and puts Enrique in danger. Peña asks Don Berna for help on a rescue mission.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: David follows his suspicions. Peña is shocked to discover the depth of corruption in the Colombian government. Miguel is sought after once again.

programme.title: Holy Rollers

programme.title: My Market Kitchen

programme.title: Eleanor Morton: Has Peaked
programme.desc: Sharp, silly stand-up infused with occasional characters and sketch about what it means to fail and keep trying.

programme.desc: Estate Sale - Johnny and Moira go to an estate sale. Mutt surprises Alexis with a bike, while Roland asks David to help him shop for a special item.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek

programme.title: F Is For Family, Season 2
programme.desc: Sue psyches herself up to speak to the Plast-a-Ware shareholders' meeting. Frank gathers some accomplices to take down Scoop, but in true Murphy family fashion, nothing goes according to plan.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate feels the pressure to land a major new client. Anne is torn between hanging on to her ambition and succumbing to the rhythm of life as a Cochrane mom.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate walks into the lioness' den with Sloane. Anne starts her new job while Alice gets closer with her new boyfriend. Jenny's secret office romance might not be exactly what she expected.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Grad Night - Johnny and Stevie celebrate their first fully booked motel David goes on a date with Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek

programme.title: Spy
programme.desc: Tim is forced to take Marcus to work with him, which risks his MI5 officer status Philip and Judith go through a role playing exercise.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything

programme.title: Conan O Brien TV
programme.desc: Conan's very special line-up of comedy legends - Tim Conway, Bob Newhart, Carol Burnett, Carl Reiner, Mel Brooks, Steve Martin and Martin Short - serve up a sophomore slump defeating curriculum of comedy.

programme.title: British Gangsters
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Bernie attempts to answer the age old question: "Does crime pay?" For many 'faces,' the initial adrenalin thrill of fast money and high rewards leads to decades of violence, prison life, destruction, fear and loss of life.

programme.title: Remember Me
programme.desc: Hannah is determined to find the missing Tom Parfitt and is convinced he's in Scarborough. Rob remains sceptical until another inexplicable death forces him to take action. But is it too late to protect Hannah and her kid brother Sean?

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: The Cali Cartel discusses moving in on Pablo's territory. Límon proposes a plan to Maritza. Tata gets a gun for protection

programme.title: Inside the Mind
programme.desc: It was a House of Horrors like no other. All around Anthony Sowell were the putrefying reminders of his actions. 11 women he had raped and strangled were either left to rot in his home or buried in his back yard. What drove this former marine to become a merciless serial killer?

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: How do you raise more than a million pounds for the public purse in just a couple of hours? We meet the Copp family who loved flaunting their wealth on social media and wound up in one of the biggest fraud investigations ever.

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: Factual. A gang of thieves steals a bicycle in broad daylight, unaware that the bike is being tracked.

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: Factual. Startling footage reveals the techniques used by a devious female thief on the loose in London who steals handbags from the unwary.

programme.title: Accused
programme.desc: Simon Gaskell (Sean Bean) stands nervously in the dock as he awaits the jury's verdict. Will he walk free or go down? Simon is a college English teacher who specialises in poetry and has a secret. His alter ego is a transvestite called Tracie Tremarco, who is gay, lonely, and looking for love.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Former `Top Gear' presenter and opinionated `The Sunday Times' and `The Sun' columnist Jeremy Clarkson presents the rebooted version of `Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?', the 12-question quiz with a £1,000,000 prize. Each contestant can use three traditional lifelines: 50-50 which removes half of the answers, Ask the Audience which polls the studio audience for their answer, and Phone a Friend, wherein the contestant can call a friend for 30 seconds to ask for their advice. However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

Designer handbag expert Claudia is tasked with evaluating a pair of bags that could help the owner build a mansion for her beloved hairless cat. David Beckham makes a surprise appearance when a sculptor brings in a life-sized statue, and with a new high-end pawnbroking store about to open in Manchester city centre, James faces his biggest challenge yet when one member of his tight-knit team drops a bombshell.

programme.title: Am I Perfect?
programme.desc: We meet Maddy, your average 19-year old girl feeling the pressures placed upon women to look a certain way – so for Ten Weeks she is going to try everything the media and her favourite celebrities suggest. Hopefully at the end she will present herself to her friends, family and public as ‘Perfect'! But first Maddy meets with the dietician who voices her concerns with the extreme nature of the challenge. Meanwhile at a medical check-up Maddy discovers she falls into the ‘OBESE' category on the BMI. Motivated now more than before, Maddy kick-starts her journey with the Cabbage Soup Diet, daily Military Boot Camp classes and receives her very first spray tan.

programme.title: Am I Perfect?
programme.desc: Maddy's spirits are high as she journeys into Week 2, having already lost 5kg she is driven to keep losing more! She eats like a caveman on the Paleo Diet, tests her coordination in Home Exercise Videos and meets with a professional to learn the tricks of makeup. Week 3 is off to a rocky start with Maddy gagging on her first spoonful of the Baby Food Diet, she seeks advice from the Internet on what to do to quench hunger. Maddy visits the Dentist to get her teeth Hollywood whitened and tries Rock Climbing for the very first time – for the first time Maddy becomes overwhelmed and breaks down in tears. She is left contemplating whether or not she should continue.

programme.title: Artist of the Year
programme.desc: James Norton, Raleigh Ritchie and Lesley Manville are the sitters as the artists compete for the £10,000 commission.

programme.title: Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Actor Trevor Eve, Fortitude star Parminder Nagra and author Ben Okri are the celebrity sitters this week as a new group of portrait artists attempt to impress the judges.

programme.title: Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Musician Rick Wakeman, Hairy Biker Dave Myers and singer Katie Kissoon are the sitters awaiting a new group of portrait artists as the competition continues.

programme.title: Artist of the Year
programme.sub-title: Adrian Chiles, Siân Phillips and Phil Davis
programme.desc: Broadcaster Adrian Chiles, actress Sian Phillips and actor Phil Davis sit for a group of portrait artists this week. Frank Skinner and Joan Bakewell host.

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.sub-title: Tilos and Symi" Tilos and Symi
programme.desc: In the last couple of episodes we've been to Kos and Nysiros and now Peter finds himself headed to the tiny island of Tilos.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Beijing is a 3000-year old metropolis home to a dizzying array of culinary traditions, not least of which is vegetarian cuisine. For Beijingers, eating vegetarian is the best way to welcome spring. Today, Tianran and Angela take up the challenge.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.sub-title: Great Walls of Beijing" Great Walls of Beijing
programme.desc: From feasts of tofu made using well-water and fish caught fresh from the reservoir, to bubbling cauldrons of thinly-sliced lamb, the hilly suburbs of Beijing are home to some of the best-loved weekend escapes, and they're all by the Great Wall.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.sub-title: How to Order Chinese Food" How to Order Chinese Food
programme.desc: In this episode, hosts Tianran and Eva will give you a crash course on everything from choosing the right restaurant, to pairing dishes according to color, aroma, taste and form, so that at the end, you too can feast your friends like a pro.

programme.title: Love On The Rocks
programme.desc: After climbing the Grand Teton, the couple head to Utah where a change of plans has them trading in their climbing shoes for an ATV. They take on Hells Revenge, a 4x4 trail only recommended for extremely experienced drivers...which they are not.

programme.title: Love On The Rocks
programme.sub-title: Deserts and Mountain Lions. Oh My!" Deserts and Mountain Lions. Oh My!
programme.desc: Hiking and canyoneering are a nice break from strenuous mountaineering, but it's hard to relax when a lack of water and mountain lions are part of the equation. Tayler and Jason both need a break...but is the break they need actually from each other?

programme.title: Love On The Rocks
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason reconnect during a romantic stay in Lake Tahoe, but Jason struggles keeping his cool while off roading the Rubicon Trail. Are Jason's high expectations too? And will these expectations shut them down on their next climb, Mt Whitney?

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Moving the leadwood tree is proving to be nerve wracking for Amanda. Back at the building site, the thatch is too heavy for the wooden frames and as a result its bending the door frames. Amanda's kids are in Zimbabwe for the school holidays.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Bruce visits Victoria Falls Safari Lodge, to check out the competition and what is on their menu. The Lodge chef shows him how to make their signature Mopane worm dish. At the house, they have a new unwanted visitor, a Mozambican Spitting Cobra.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.sub-title: The Elephant In The Room" The Elephant In The Room
programme.desc: Lyndal and Amanda are at a local market buying some wooden tables for the lodge as well as a few wood statues. Lyndal takes a quiet time out and goes to visit the Victoria Falls. Amanda, Bruce and Mark head into town for a farewell dinner for Bruce.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.sub-title: Right As Rain" Right As Rain
programme.desc: On the building site, Mark is doing some minor interior decorating in the bathrooms. Lyndal and Amanda interview possible lodge staff. Meanwhile Bruce is in the kitchen trying to make his version of the South African dish called bobotie.

programme.title: City Breaks, Cologne(Eng)
programme.desc: Christina visits the 2000 year old city of Cologne and delves into museums dedicated to chocolate to museums showcasing world's greatest art.

programme.title: Off The Grid Gondar, Ethiopia (ENG)
programme.desc: Emeline learns about the history of Ethiopia at the Gondar Castle, and goes on to explore the stunning, rock-hewn Lalibela churches.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland Perth (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie's adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Quest Heritage Haveli, India (ENG)
programme.desc: Where many ancient Indian civilizations flourished in the most resource-filled areas, the people of Rajasthan created a powerful, complex, layered and regal culture and cuisine in the largely arid land that they called home. Alex discovers this when she meets Anjali Singh, a member of the royal family of Jaipur, who shows her how to make two prized recipes from her family's legacy - Papad Ki Chutney and Safed Murg.

programme.title: City Breaks, Cologne(Eng)
programme.desc: Christina visits the 2000 year old city of Cologne and delves into museums dedicated to chocolate to museums showcasing world's greatest art.

programme.title: Off The Grid Gondar, Ethiopia (ENG)
programme.desc: Emeline learns about the history of Ethiopia at the Gondar Castle, and goes on to explore the stunning, rock-hewn Lalibela churches.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city's doorstep.

programme.title: Great World Hotels Dieswaene (ENG)
programme.desc: Elisha gets some old-world style pampering at Die Swaene, a luxury boutique hotel situated in the heart of the historic center of Bruges.

programme.title: Off The Grid Omo Valley, Ethiopia (ENG)
programme.desc: In Omo Valley, Emeline visits the Hamer, Karo and Dassanach tribes, and learns about their distinct culture and curious traditions.

programme.title: Quest Mumbai 1, India (ENG)
programme.desc: Considered among the oldest communities in India, the Gaud Saraswat Brahmans have a culture and cuisine that is still largely unexplored. Eisha sets out to explore the lesser-known flavours of this cuisine with the renowned chef, Sudip Pai, who introduces her to some of the culinary gems of his community. While she cooks with him, she also comes to know about the beliefs and traditions that govern the cuisine and way of life of the community.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland Inverness (ENG)
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie's journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: World Heritage Ancient CIties of Sri Lanka (ENG)
programme.desc: The central plains of Sri Lanka are dotted with crumbling temples, lost cities and ruins of sacred Buddhist sites. It was here that ancient Sinhalese dynasties set up their capitals and supported massive artistic and architectural endeavors. Sigiriya, the ancient fortress atop a 66o-feet-high rock soaring out of a forest, and Polonnaruwa, the epitome of ancient Buddhist architecture, with its refined carvings, are but a few of the sites now ranking as national treasures.

programme.title: Off The Grid Jinka, Ethiopia (ENG)
programme.desc: In Jinka, Emeline visits the Mursi and other tribes, and learns about their distinct cultures and curious traditions.

programme.title: National Parks Adventure
programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America's most legendary outdoor playgrounds.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America's Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation: Washington D.C.
programme.desc: The Ellis Family explores Washington D.C., discovering monuments, Ford's Theatre, and the best cupcakes in the capital!

programme.title: Ben & Jerry's Flavor Graveyard
programme.sub-title: Mermaid Show - Cog Railray - Sneaker Convention - Bug Art Collection
programme.desc: Will finds himself in the middle of an ice cream catastrophe at Ben & Jerry's Factory in Waterbury, Vermont mingles with mermaids at the underwater show in Weeki Wachee, Florida achieves speeds of 5 miles per hour on the cog wheel train to the summit of Mt. Washington, New Hampshire buys new kicks at a Sneaker convention in Cleveland and marvels at Bug Art portraits at a museum in St. Johnsbury, Vermont.

programme.title: Gatorland
programme.sub-title: Muhammad Ali Collection - West Virginia State Penitentiary - Randyland
programme.desc: Will tries and fails to ride an alligator at Orlando's Gatorland drops in on the only used car dealership with a priceless collection of Muhammad Ali memorabilia in New Hampshire dabbles in the paranormal at the abandoned and haunted West Virginia State Penitentiary and then meets an outrageous artist who is creating a psychedelic city block in Pittsburgh known as “Randyland.”

programme.title: Golf Ball Diving
programme.sub-title: Haskell Free Library - Palace of Gold - African-American Heritage Museum - Smog Museum
programme.desc: Will learns the hazards and rewards of professional Golf Ball Diving in Kissimmee, Florida considers defecting to a foreign country at a library that sits smack dab on the Vermont – Canadian border discovers a Hari Krishna commune with an incredible “Palace of Gold” in the hills of West Virginia marvels at outdoor sculptures at the African-American Heritage Museum in Hammond, Louisiana, and catches his breath in Donora, Pennsylvania at the world's only “Smog Museum.”

programme.title: Pierogi Fest
programme.sub-title: Lambert's Café - Bird Cage Theater - National Wildlife Property Repository - Unicycle Football
programme.desc: Will meets Mr. Pierogi, Ms. Pasczki and the polka-loving Pierorgettes at Pierogi Fest in Whiting, Indiana ducks for cover at Lambert's Café in Alabama discovers where the bullets are buried in Tombstone Arizona's Bird Cage theater is shocked by the products made from endangered animals confiscated by the National Wildlife Property Repository near Denver and cheers on the daring (and possibly deranged) participants at a Unicycle Football game in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Q: Alabama's Barbecue Legends
programme.desc: The story of Alabama barbecue can't be told in sentences. It's told through whiffs of smoke, buckets of sauce and friendly nods across the counter. See how a simple dish has become a culinary anthem for Alabama.

programme.title: Tying the Knot at 13,000 Feet
programme.desc: A romantic trip to Colorado takes a windy turn when Jason pushes Tayler, despite her hesitation, to summit Mt. Democrat in 70 mph winds and -19 degree weather.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Watch Hope care for beavers before learning the fate of a famous patient.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Watch as Chris tries to free a swan from a soccer net and revive an unlucky cat.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Two beavers need emergency lodging. Life on the rehab through the eyes of a volunteer.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: The clinic gets an odd employee, and Sash investigates a paralyzed coolie.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A kelpie gets life-changing wheels, and Chris helps a first-time alligator mom.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Sit in on urgent kangaroo surgery and meet a dog with a special human friend.

programme.title: King Charles III: A New Era
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth II is dead. The sun has set on the second great Elizabeth era. The Prince of Wales ascends to the throne and becomes King Charles III.

programme.title: The New Royals
programme.desc: An analysis of the trials of being an up-and-coming royal in the modern world, and how they compares with the life of a celebrity.

programme.title: Cambodia's Monarchy
programme.desc: King Sihanouk retired in 2004, giving way to his son, Sihamoni - a ballet dancer. Unlike many monarchies, Cambodia's is not hereditary - rather the next king or queen mother is chosen by the National Assembly from a pool of eligible candidates. When Sihamoni was chosen, what sort of monarch were they hoping to crown?

programme.title: Fergie: The Downfall of a Duchess
programme.desc: The events that culminated in the very public divorce of Fergie and Prince Andrew.

programme.title: Queen Louise
programme.desc: Known as the Queen of Hearts during her lifetime, Louise of Prussia had no official political or military power. However, she wielded influence over the men who did-predominantly her husband, King Frederick Wilhelm III-and she had the stature and style to become a symbolic figure.

programme.title: Chasing the Royals: The Media and the Monarchy
programme.desc: The monarchy and the media are like a couple who are constantly feuding but can't afford to divorce. They're together forever. This film chronicles the frenzied, comical and often nasty relationship between the royals and the "rat pack" chasing them.

programme.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla: Into the Unknown

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword.Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely. The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Megatron presumed dead, Starscream makes his boldest grab for power yet.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: On the island of Bali, large robotic insects are eating everything in their path and terrorizing everyone.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While Optimus faces off with Predaking, Megatron mounts a campaign to form a new alliance with Rachet.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet finds himself in a series of predicaments as he resumes his experiments on Synthetic Energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The fate of Earth hangs in the balance as the Autobots and Decepticons march toward their last stand.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: It's been 10 Earth years since the last battle against Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: It's been 10 years since Megatron disappeared and the Autobots and Decepticons now work side by side.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots decide to send away all the civilians living in the energon mining bases.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Optimus Prime patrols the city in search of Soundwave.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Soundwave has trapped the Autobots in a virtual reality.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Spike is wounded and knocked unconscious in a Decepticon attack.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, can freeze any object in motion.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime sends the Dinogots to a remote and mysterious island.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tattle-Tail Smurfs: Brainy Smurf's had enough. The Smurflings and Sassette keep on telling tales about him with unpleasant results. He therefore concocts a magic formula, taken from Papa Smurf's books of spells, which makes the little Smurfs' tails grow longer and longer every time they tell tales. What he hasn't counted on is that Gargamel now has a way of catching the Smurflings.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Mere Truffle: The Smurfs love truffles but truffles belong to the Trolls and the Trolls live under Truffle Troll Mountain, where in the shadows of the lake lurks the Thing with No Name...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All Hallowseve: While out on a mischief-making mission to destroy the Smurfs' Happy Halloween party, Gargamel and Hogatha catch Lazy who has been accidentally turned red by Mother Nature. Papa and the Smurfs help Lazy escape while Mother Nature has Father Time help turn Lazy's red into blue just in time for the Halloween party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sir Hefty: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Last Whippoorwill
programme.desc: There are poachers in the Duke of Bedford's forest. They almost succeed in catching the Whippoorwill that lives there... But worse than that, the Duke's son, Chauncey, finds the bird's egg and takes it to the castle for his collection. The Whippoorwill is not doing its insect-eating job anymore, and gnats, mosquitoes, bugs of every type abound. Can the Smurfs restore the Whippoorwill's egg to be nest?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - It's A Puppy's Life: The evil wizard Gargamel has got hold of magical ectoplasmic crystal eggs that will enable him to change bodies with Papa Smurf. What better plan could there be? Disguised as Papa Smurf, he's going to lead all the Smurfs to his cauldron! But as fate would have it, Gargamel is changed into Puppy, the Smurf doggie...

programme.title: How To Smurf A Rainbow
programme.desc: Mother Nature is too busy to conjure a rainbow for the Smurfs' festival, so Papa Smurf borrows her cookbook and mixes up the recipe himself. As there is no yellow available, they use the leprechaun's gold to produce a beautiful rainbow before Gargamel can steal it.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Puppy Prescription: Gargamel conjures a spell that makes Puppy think he's a cat. Papa receives a prescription from Homnibus to reverse the spell and all the Smurfs help. As Puppy becomes a dog again, Gargamel gets too close and he becomes a cat.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Wedding Day: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Word: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs At Sea: Papa Smurf recalls Dreamy's exciting voyage on the high seas and his gripping adventures with sea turtles, whales, desert islands... and pirates!

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: Smurfette's Gift
programme.desc: Every year, Smurfette snoops around to discover what her birthday presents will be before she receives them. But this year, Sassette has created the Keep-Smurfette's-Presents-a-Surprise-Committee. Nat has discovered a cave where they might be able to hide all the gifts prepared by the Smurfs. But what this cave also hides is a greedy imp who is not only interested in keeping Smurfette's gifts...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Magnifying Mixture: Brainy makes an enlarging potion that turns Hefty into human size. The big-little strong man captures Gargamel and brings him back to the Smurf Village where Papa Smurf magically causes Azrael to chase his master back to his dreary castle.

programme.title: Smurfing In Sign Language
programme.desc: The Smurfs meet a woodland elf, who teaches them sign language after Gargamel inflicts a no-speaking potion on them.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: Queen Smurfette
programme.desc: Smurfette becomes Queen for a day on her birthday. But this gets out of hand when Father Time falls asleep, neglecting to end the days. Tempers begin to flare among the Smurfs, who are tired of servitude. Papa rushes to wake Father Time and brings peace again to Smurfland.

programme.title: Hefty And The Wheelsmurfer
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf learns what is to be handicapped when he breaks his leg. Handy Smurf creates the wheelsmurfer for him, a contraption that will give Hefty some mobility. But suddenly the evil wizard Gargamel appears on the scene.

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are eating Tubby Toast. They play the game 'Two Little Teletubbies', but while they are playing the Noo-Noo tidies up their Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see some children visit a level crossing and watch a train pass by. The Teletubbies play their Ready, Steady, Go game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children are playing football in the park. Laa-Laa and Po love playing with the ball. While they play they sing a song about the ball.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa sit down to eat some Tubby Custard. Po wants some too. She tries to eat the other's Tubby Custard, but they won't let her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind a hill to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty sausage. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po go for a walk, so Laa-Laa decides to dance a secret dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for the Teletubbies to do their exercises. A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies stretch up and down to it's instructions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance an up and down dance. They watch some children painting pictures and patterns on to eggs. In Teletubbyland, Laa-Laa dances with her ball until the magical tree appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Polar Squad
programme.desc: It's time to run with the big dogs, in this sweet and hilarious icy adventure! Swifty the Arctic Fox works in the mailroom of the Arctic Blast Delivery Service but dreams of one day becoming a Top Dog (the Arctic's star husky courier). To prove himself worthy, Swifty secretly commandeers one of the sleds and delivers a mysterious package to a secret location. There, he comes face to face with Otto Von Walrus, a blubbery evil genius. Swifty soon discovers Otto Von Walrus' plan to drill beneath Arctic surface to unleash enough ancient gas to melt the Arctic, in order to reign as the world's supreme leader.

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: Starring Michael Paré, (Gone), Nancy Valen (Loverboy) and Eileen Davidson (The Young and the Restless). A small town headmaster and her teenage daughter plan a Christmas concert to save the school. When tragedy strikes the family, an unexpected friend makes a decision that will bond their families together forever. A town comes together to realise the important bonds of friendship and family.

programme.title: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: When Anna, an unemployed painter, is unable to make ends meet, she is hired to become a personal Christmas shopper for Marc, an uptight corporate exec. As they work together, Marc learns that Christmas giving has less to do with the amount of money spent and more to do with the importance of the gift, while Anna discovers she might find success as an artist in a way she never expected.

programme.title: Looks Like Christmas
programme.desc: From cooking to decorating, Carol sleeps and breathes Christmas, so it's no wonder the town refers to her as “Christmas Carol” but when a handsome man comes to town and challenges her traditional holiday views, Carol must learn how to compromise even if it means facing an unexpected romance.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Surviving Love

programme.title: Return of Sabata
