programme.title: Man, Pride & Vengeance
programme.desc: A stalwart Spanish soldier turns to a life of crime to prove his love for a mysterious and promiscuous gypsy woman.

programme.title: The Cariboo Trail
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: Shoot the Living and Pray for the Dead
programme.desc: After Dan Hogan and his gang rob a bank, they hire a mysterious man to guide them across the Mexican border in return for half of the loot.

programme.title: The Dating List
programme.desc: Abby Morel is a bright, young editor's assistant living in the big city. Wanting to get ahead in her career, she makes an unusual deal with her high-flying boss, Susan. Susan is far too busy to date, but she wants to fall in love.

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Christmas à la Carte
programme.desc: When food correspondent, CARLY, gets a shot at her own show nothing goes as planned. She's sent to Angel Heights to help GRANT, a chef, reopen her family's beloved diner and film it for her television show.

programme.title: Dancing Through Christmas
programme.desc: OLIVIA is picked to run the Christmas recital of The Nutcracker. When a video of Michael practising ballet with Lily goes viral, Olivia sees how much dance really means to the community. Will Olivia be able to save her dance studio with Michael's help?

programme.title: Christmas at Pemberly Manor
programme.desc: A NYC event planner butts heads and then falls for a billionaire who is in the process of selling the charming estate she was hoping to use as a venue.

programme.title: Howl
programme.desc: Last train. Full moon. All change. When a late-night train journey out of London comes to a sudden halt the driver goes out to investigate but fails to return. The young guard and passengers are alone on the train and forced into a fight for survival against a pack of malevolent and terrifying creatures.

programme.title: Navy Seals Vs. Zombies
programme.desc: A team of highly skilled Navy Seals find themselves embarking on the battle of their lives when they come face-to-face with the undead. After a deadly outbreak occurs in New Orleans, the Seals must fight for their lives, and the city, against an army of zombies. A.K.A. Navy Seals: Battle for New Orleans

programme.title: Berlin I Love You
programme.desc: Latest instalment of the Cities of Love series (Paris, je t'aime / New York, I Love You / Rio, Eu Te Amo), this collective feature film is made of ten stories of romance set in the German capital.

programme.title: Made for You with Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: L'Estraneo
programme.desc: Cristian falls in love with Greta, a girl speaking with Spanish accent, a little bit younger than him, who spreads a light and enthusiasm quite different from Cristian's. He lives his love affairs, but, as often happens, “love is not enough”, and soon Christian himself calls into question his whole life and people belonging to it, in order to find serenity.

programme.title: Litorai
programme.desc: A short documentary that tells the story of a town, a marriage and a way of understanding life that only remains in memories.

programme.title: Keepsake
programme.desc: Janine is a young woman on the road to a new life when a freak accident strands her on a deserted highway and a call for help soon becomes a fight for survival. Stalked and tormented by a psychotic tow truck driver, Janine soon finds herself trapped in a world of torture and depravity, imprisoned in a cellar and given only thirty days to live! Janine must contend with both the ghosts of her past and the demons of her present in an effort to survive.

programme.title: Range War
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) comes to the rescue of the railroad when a land baron and his gang try to prevent its construction.

programme.title: A Bucket Of Blood
programme.desc: A dim-witted busboy finds acclaim as an artist for a plaster-covered dead cat that is mistaken as a skillful statuette. The desire for more praise soon leads to an increasingly deadly series of works.

programme.title: Waiting
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds, Anna Ferris, and Justin Long serve up the laughs as young waiters and waitresses searching for the meaning of life, love, and friendship in this outrageous comedy.

programme.title: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: A pair of high-frequency traders go up against their old boss in an effort to make millions in a fibre-optic cable deal.

programme.title: After Life
programme.desc: After a horrific car accident, Anna (Christina Ricci) wakes up to find the funeral director (Liam Neeson) preparing her body for her funeral.

programme.title: Gigantic
programme.desc: Mattress salesman Brian Weathersby (Paul Dano) falls in love with a woman (Zooey Deschanel) who comes to his store and falls asleep on one of his beds. Also starring John Goodman.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Odd Thomas
programme.desc: From Stephen Sommers director of The Mummy and G.I JOE, presents his latest supernatural teen horror Odd Thomas. Based on the best-selling novel by Dean Koontz, Odd Thomas is not like other 20 year old boys instead he has the clairvoyant ability to see dead people! Working alongside his local police chief, Odd uses his gift to fight evil and catch the bad guys! However, when he starts to see monstrous creatures, he knows a horrific event is fated to occur. Only he can try to save everyone before all hell breaks loose. But with many obstacles in his way- will Odd be too late?

programme.title: Apocalypse Earth
programme.desc: When Earth is invaded by a militant alien race, soldiers and civilians are loaded onto arc-like spaceships, to flee to habitable planets beyond the galaxy. One such group of survivors lands on a mysterious and seemingly alluring planet, only to discover they're not alone and they'd better adapt, fast. Deadly predators await their every turn: giant lizards, terrestrial monsters and tribes of humanoid creatures, some of whom will become their friends... but can they be trusted? Light years from home and with a damaged spaceship, will they fulfil their dreams of seeing Earth again?

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: When a freak tornado swamps Los Angeles, thousands of man-eating sharks are sucked into the swirling vortex, terrorizing the waterlogged populace and flooding the city with shark-infested seawater. Surfer and bar-owner Fin (Ian Ziering, Beverley Hills, 90210) sets out with his friends Baz (Jaason Simmons, Baywatch) and Nova to rescue his estranged wife April and teenage daughter Claudia from the sharks raining down from the skies. With nature's deadliest killer ruling sea, land, and air, they soon realise that the only way to survive the deadly shark-infested maelstrom is to tackle it head on. Their plan? Commandeer a helicopter and fly close enough to launch bombs directly into the tornado!

programme.title: Lapsis
programme.desc: Your life belongs to the machine… Struggling to support himself and his brother, Ray takes up work in the gig economy, laying cable to connect mysterious floating cubes. His new job is strange and highly pressured but extremely lucrative. As time passes his job becomes automated and he finds himself racing to complete his tasks before the robot cablers sharing his route. With this added pressure and growing hostility from those on the trail with him, will Ray even make it through the day? Black Mirror meets Birdbox, Lapsis is an innovative, engagingly topical, darkly funny and breathlessly creative piece of sci-fi cinema.

programme.title: All of My heart 2
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are preparing for the big opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn, when a huge storm hits Bucks County. Brian agrees to return to Wall Street to boost their funds, while Jenny scrambles to keep the opening on time.

programme.title: Nash
programme.desc: This coming of age documentary chronicles the life of NBA All Star Steve Nash as he tries to navigate his way through the somewhat toils of professional sports while trying to leave a lasting legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is cooking for girls night and must figure out how to please both of her friends!

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori surprises her family with a meal that transports them to Spain.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Liz and Kappa Psi Psi prep for Gamma Fair and T-shirt sales. Alan's class inspires Anna's look change.

programme.title: Mediator
programme.desc: A family counselor in the missing children's division becomes a mediator between the living and the missing.

programme.title: Inconceivable
programme.desc: A woman interprets a kiss at a high school reunion as an invitation to follow her ex across the country and supplant his current family.

programme.title: Tennessee Williams' The Roman Spring of Mrs. Stone
programme.desc: After moving to Rome, a lonely widow finds herself consumed by a destructive love for a young Italian man in this adaptation of Tennessee Williams' haunting novella.

programme.title: Romance and Cigarettes
programme.desc: A down-and-dirty' musical set in the world of working-class New York, tells a story of a husband's journey into infidelity and redemption.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans...

programme.title: Granada Nights
programme.desc: A British tourist is stuck in Granada, Spain with a broken heart. Feeling lost and abandoned, he befriends a group of young foreigners and crashes into the heart of the international student scene.

programme.title: American Assassin
programme.desc: A CIA black-ops recruit uses his lethal skills to try and stop a rogue operative with a deadly agenda.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: Two childhood friends plan to rob an armored-car depository, but an NYPD officer stands in their way.

programme.title: American Assassin
programme.desc: A CIA black-ops recruit uses his lethal skills to try and stop a rogue operative with a deadly agenda.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: Two childhood friends plan to rob an armored-car depository, but an NYPD officer stands in their way.

programme.title: Warm Bodies
programme.desc: A zombie and an uninfected girl form an unlikely relationship.

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story of It
programme.desc: Exploring the 1990 mini-series, based on Stephen King's iconic novel IT, this documentary tells a story heard by few and showcases a wealth of behind-the-scenes footage and photos seen by even fewer. From investigating the cultural phenomenon of coulrophobia (the fear of clowns) to Tim Curry's magical portrayal of the notorious clown monster, this story promises to dig deeper into the Pennywise phenomenon than ever before! Featuring interviews with many of the cult classic's key players, including director Tommy Lee Wallace and cast members Tim Curry, Seth Green, and Richard Thomas.

programme.title: I Know Who Killed Me
programme.desc: An idyllic small town is rocked when Aubrey Fleming (Lindsay Lohan), a bright and promising young college student is abducted and tortured by a sadistic serial killer. When she manages to escape, the traumatised girl who regains consciousness in the hospital insists that her identity is that of Dakota Moss a stripper in a seedy club and that the real Aubrey Fleming is still in mortal danger. A taut and gripping erotic thriller with a captivating riddle at its centre, I Know Who Killed Me explores the dark side of identity, sexuality and obsession.

programme.title: 30 Days Of Night
programme.desc: Barrow, Alaska: A remote, isolated town that is plunged into a state of complete darkness for 30 days every winter. It is here that a group of marauding, merciless and bloodthirsty vampires, led by Marlow (Danny Huston), are coming. Their intention? A month long, uninterrupted feast of its helpless residents. It is up to Sheriff Eben (Josh Hartnett), his estranged wife, Stella (Melissa George), and an ever-shrinking group of survivors to do anything and everything they can to last till daylight.

programme.title: IP Man: The Awakening
programme.desc: The legendary Ip Man returns to the big screen to uncover the first action-packed chapter in the story of the man who would become a world-renowned martial arts master.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Full of love and humour, this charming father-daughter tale is set to tug at your heart-strings. Struggling dancer, Athena (Rose Leslie: Game of Thrones) decides to move back home when her father (Ray Liotta) is diagnosed with cancer. But when a life-changing call-back comes her way, will Athena take up her dream opportunity? An uplifting journey of life, sacrifice and - balance! Ground-breaking!

programme.title: Superbob
programme.desc: Superbob is a hilarious and touching new twist on the superhero genre starring legendary British comedian Catherine Tate (The Office). 7 years ago Robert Kenner, a mild mannered postman from Peckham, South London was struck by a meteor which bestowed him with super powers. 6 years later, Bob finally gets a day off from his superhero duties and tries to get a shot at love

programme.title: Come to Daddy
programme.desc: Elijah Wood (The Lord of the Rings) stars in this critically acclaimed, genre-bending horror comedy thatll leave you shocked and in hysterics. After years of no contact, Norval (Wood) visits his estranged father (Stephen McHattie, Watchmen) and quickly discovers he has a shady past. Also starring Michael Smiley (Kill List) and Garfield Wilson (The Man in the High Castle).

programme.title: Open Grave
programme.desc: This twisted thriller will keep you guessing until the bitter end. Waking up in a pit of dead bodies with no memory, a man joins forces with a group of strangers. Together they must figure out who is behind the mysterious mass killings. But suspicions give way to violence, as they piece together their identities and discover a much more vicious and deadly threat to their survival.

programme.title: Santa's Secret
programme.desc: Nicky is a single mum who experiences the magic of Christmas when she finds love and is offered an unlikely new job. Alicia Witt and Wallace Shawn star. (2014)

programme.title: Christmas Angel
programme.desc: When Christmas wishes start coming true when made in-front of a long-abandoned house a young schoolgirl finds a reclusive woman living inside. (2012)

programme.title: Kristin's Christmas Past
programme.desc: Kristin is magically transported back in time to a fateful Christmas Eve. Can she help her younger self alter the chain of events which drove her and her family apart? Stars Shiri Appleby (2013)

programme.title: Christmas Song
programme.desc: Two music teachers are forced to compete against each other in a televised Christmas choir contest. Will their passion for music develop into love for one another? Natasha Henstridge stars. (2012)

programme.title: Christmas In The Smokies
programme.desc: In an effort to save her family's historic berry farm from foreclosure, an ambitious young woman organises a Christmas concert. Stars Sarah Lancaster, Barry Corbin, Alan Powell (2015)

programme.title: Love On The Menu
programme.desc: Chef Hank balances raising his daughter on his own and making a success out of his restaurant. Will a misunderstanding with Autumn Reeser who plays Maggie, throw Hank off his balance? (2019)

programme.title: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: Jamie Spellman struggles to balance her dream of painting with the reality of such a difficult career choice, while having to choose between two men who seem perfect, but for very different reasons.

programme.title: Love Locks
programme.desc: Single mum Lindsey returns to Paris to show her daughter where she went to college. By chance, Lindsey bumps into her college boyfriend, Jack. Will they fall back in love after 20 years apart? (2017)

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Lily goes home to help run her Aunts Inn. Has handsome loner Marcus come out of his shell since her return to town? Will the unexpected appearance of Lily's ex pull him back into his shell. (2020)

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Romance Novelist Jo must work with Navy Seal officer Colin on her next book. Will Colin put Jo through the wringer, or will cupids bow bring this unlikely pair together in harmony? (2017)

programme.title: Frightened City
programme.desc: The 'protection racket' is rampant in London. The basic procedure for the crooks is to threaten shop-keepers and café proprietors with the destruction of their premises unless they pay a regular weekly sum of money for 'protection'.

programme.title: HIDDEN HOMICIDE
programme.desc: On the surface of a seaside holiday camp, it would appear that all those there have come for fun, dancing and swimming. But under this shallow facade are a group of people who have gone there either for excitement or escape.

programme.title: THE HORNET'S NEST
programme.desc: Story of how two young models take over a barge moored off Chelsea in which crooks have hidden the proceeds of a large-scale jewel robbery.

programme.title: Fear in the Night
programme.desc: It took Penny Heller a long time to recover from the trauma of a brutal physical assault, suffered in her youth. When she married Robert, he provided her with the love and reassurance she craved for and the two settled down in a pretty house in the grounds of the public school where Robert was a master.

programme.title: And Soon the Darkness
programme.desc: Ellie and Stephanie, early 20s, have left their cycling tour group to go it alone around Argentina, looking for breathtaking scenery, adventure, fun.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Jack Regan (Ray Winstone) and his loyal partner George Carter (Ben Drew) are old school crime fighters enforcing the law in a modern underworld.

programme.title: After Life
programme.desc: After a horrific car accident, Anna (Christina Ricci) wakes up to find the funeral director (Liam Neeson) preparing her body for her funeral.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: Joey Jones is an ex-Special Forces soldier who is homeless on the streets after going on the run from a military court-martial. In desperation, he breaks into a vacated luxury apartment where he seizes the opportunity to turn his life around: get clean and get a job.

programme.title: Saints & Soliders 2: Airborne Creed
programme.desc: On August 15th 1944, the 517th Parachute Regimental Combat Team (PRCT) jumped over the south of France. In their effort to complete the mission and rendezvous with their unit, three isolated paratroopers come across a group of French resistants in desperate need.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The "Angels", three investigative agents (Barrymore, Diaz and Liu) who work for the Charles Townsend Detective Agency, return for another high-octane series of adventures as they investigate the theft of a database of witness protection profiles, after five of the people on the list are murdered. They're aided by a new Bosley (Bernie Mac), in an adventure which pits them against a "fallen angel" (Moore), their old nemesis, the Thin Man (Glover), and others.

programme.title: Wild Things
programme.desc: A schoolgirl's accusation of sexual assault triggers a scandal in a wealthy Florida yachting enclave.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: Mixed Nuts
programme.desc: From the director of Sleepless in Seattle, the endearingly off-center employees of a suicide hotline hope for a Christmas miracle.

programme.title: Murphy's Romance
programme.desc: Sometimes before you can fall in love, you need a little push.

programme.title: Just One Of The Guys
programme.desc: Aspiring entrepreneurs pitch their business ideas to moguls, known as the "Sharks," in hopes of landing investment funds in this U.S. adaptation of the British and Japanese reality hit Dragons' Den.

programme.title: Rock The Kasbah
programme.desc: ROCK THE KASBAH is the story of 'Richie Vance,' a has-been rock manager who takes his last remaining client on a USO tour of Afghanistan. When Richie finds himself in Kabul, abandoned, penniless and without his passport, he discovers a young girl with an extraordinary voice and manages her through Afghanistan's version of 'American Idol', the wildly popular 'Afghan Star'.

programme.title: Parts Per Billion
programme.desc: In the midst of a manmade biological disaster and a terrible fate, three couples try to find meaning in their lives.

programme.title: To Write Love on Her Arms
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this musical drama tells the story of how artistic fantasy, music and friendships helped teenager Renee embark on a courageous journey towards recovery.

programme.title: The Nines
programme.desc: An intricately constructed blur of reality, virtual reality and metaphysical fantasy, The Nines unfolds in three separate but parallel and connected movies, featuring the same actors and often overlapping incarnations.

programme.title: The New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Starring Romain Duris and based on the story by Ruth Rendell, The New Girlfriend is a witty and hilarious take on gender and sexuality, from internationally-acclaimed director François Ozon.

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: The strength of a young Irishman's convictions brings him into conflict with his unsuspecting host and draws them both into danger.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: A New Yorker, takes up a job as a security with the Empire State Armoured Truck Company after failing to secure a job with the NYPD. After discovering that he is able to use his position to his advantage, he is drawn into an elaborate scheme to rob his company, resulting in the largest cash heist.

programme.title: Pursuit
programme.desc: Undercover Detective Mike Breslin is embedded deep within a ruthless drugs cartel, hunting for his wife's killer. But as his deadly pursuit forces him ever higher through the gang's ranks, he must forge an uneasy alliance with a reckless hacker to reach the top, and get his man.

Based on actual events - A group of 5 people find themselves trapped in an elevator in the World Trade Center's North Tower on 9/11. They work together, never giving up hope, to try to escape before the unthinkable happens.

programme.title: Mehek S1 E34
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats S1 E34
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts S1 E34
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances S1 E34
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar S1 E34
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Planet California: Close Encounters
programme.desc: From the majesty of blue whales and the menace of great white sharks to the curious habits of the kangaroo rat and playful kit foxes, rare and spectacular footage brings California's wildlife into sharp focus. Cataclysmic events like earthquakes and El Nino's storms rock and shape the land, yet some species - like Methuselah, one of the oldest organisms in the world - persist, constantly adapting to a rapidly changing world. Still, in a space shared with 40 million people, is there room for all? The pressure heats up in dramatic and challenging habitats. Move over Hollywood. Planet California's wildlife stars are ready for their close-up.

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: The crocodile is king of the wetland a tone of cold blooded monster with the most terrifying bite force on Earth. The product of a 100 million year ancestry, the 25 species around today are testament to the crocodile's supreme intelligence and adaptability.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Elephant human conflict has been going on in India for decades. Only now it has increased because of the shrinking forests and the expanding human habitation. North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict

programme.title: Ocean's Africa
programme.desc: In A 'Tale Of Two Sharks' we take a look at the incredible array of sharks found off the South African coast, focusing on the endangered Scalloped Hammerhead and the iconic Great White.

programme.title: Nature's Cutest
programme.desc: As we all know the natural world can be tough and challenging at times, but it can also be nothing short of adorable.

programme.title: Planet California: Close Encounters
programme.desc: From the majesty of blue whales and the menace of great white sharks to the curious habits of the kangaroo rat and playful kit foxes, rare and spectacular footage brings California's wildlife into sharp focus. Cataclysmic events like earthquakes and El Nino's storms rock and shape the land, yet some species - like Methuselah, one of the oldest organisms in the world - persist, constantly adapting to a rapidly changing world. Still, in a space shared with 40 million people, is there room for all? The pressure heats up in dramatic and challenging habitats. Move over Hollywood. Planet California's wildlife stars are ready for their close-up.

programme.title: The marvellous World of French Rivers: Marvellous french Rivers
programme.desc: The Gironde is the largest and most powerful tidal current in Europe. When the Gironde flows into the Atlantic, it is 15 kilometers wide and in the rhythm of the tides, it brings the waters from the Pyrenees and the Massif Central into the ocean. This often pushes its waters far out into the Gironde at high tide.This creates a world of its own that has shaped everything uniquely and intensely for tens of thousands of years. The water surface of the river is so large that the evaporation has created its own microclimate, which is stable and, together with the brackish waters, has influenced flora and fauna on the right and left of the bank for a long time.

programme.title: The marvellous World of French Rivers: Marvellous french Rivers
programme.desc: The Dordogne consists of a visible and an invisible system of flowing water. Caves and basins under the earth's surface store the excess water and return it to the river when it is dry. A perfect management of a precious resource, not invented by humans, but by the complex nature itself. The result is an ever life-giving river.

programme.title: Wild River Rhine
programme.desc: Alluvial forests, roaring waterfalls, steep canyons and sunny slopes flank the river Rhine. The variety of habitats is the reason for the large biodiversity along the stream.There is hardly any other river in Germany that is surrounded by as many myths and legends as the river Rhine. No other river has been the topic of songs, has been painted and travelled equally frequently. Despite this it still seems to be true today what the French poet Victor Hugo once said about this river – the Rhine is a river everybody talks about, nobody explores, everybody visits but no one really knows. The film follows the water against the stream. It starts at the river's delta in the Netherlands, flows through six countries and ends in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Fjord, ford, bay, gulf: there are many names for the beautiful extensions of the Baltic Sea into the country. Eckernförde Bay is shaped by currents, surf and people. It stretches 17 kilometers to the town that gives it its name. Stephan Möller is the acting shooting master of the Eckernförder Bürgerschützengilde. He spent a whole year preparing the beach shooting festival and then this: fog, rain and a stiff breeze. Traditionally, the Eckernförde marksmen always shoot at a wooden bird in the direction of the sea at Whitsun. Under strict conditions! And these stipulate a clear view of at least one kilometer out into the bay. The event literally threatens to fall through, for the first time in 449 years. Around 3,000 soldiers are stationed at the Eckernförde naval base, but only a small group is allowed to call itself an elite unit: the mine divers. They are considered the toughest soldiers in the Navy. Anyone who wants to be one of them has to undergo extreme training. This year, just two candidates made it to the final round. Now they still have to pass the dreaded final exam: running 20 kilometers with marching gear and then swimming ten kilometers through Eckernförde Bay.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The Wismar Bay is unique in its diversity on the Mecklenburg Baltic Sea coast: cliffs, sandy beaches, salt marshes, enchanted islands and, last but not least, the proud Hanseatic city of Wismar with its brick Gothic buildings, which are a UNESCO World Heritage Site. When the mighty logs get wedged together in the timber mill in the port of Wismar, Steven Buchholz has to get to work with his chainsaw. It's a dangerous job, because the logs weigh tons. As a trained carpenter, Steven is a virtuoso with the chain saw. Even after his shift is over, he is looking for the thrill: the wind off his home island of Poel is favorable that day and he wants to reclaim the German record in the kite surfing high jump. For a long time, Ramona Stelzer only knew fish as a tasty ingredient between two halves of a bun. But when the goldsmith got her hands on fish leather, her business idea was born: she processes the unique natural product fish skin into fine jewelry. The problem is that hardly anyone in Germany tans fish skin. In order to reliably obtain supplies, Ramona now wants to learn this craft herself.

programme.title: In Search of Old Russia: St. Petersburg
programme.sub-title: The Enchantment of the White Nights
programme.desc: This series delves deep into this more than thousand-year-old cultural history in Europe's East. For the very first time, sensational footage, shot by the world's best cameramen, presents a bird's-eye view of the most important and most beautiful buildings of Old Russia. The camera explores en detail art and ornamentation, mounted on high on these splendid structures centuries ago to the glory of God, far above the line of vision of humans. Authors familiar with Russian culture find the material for their stories beneath the roofs and golden onion-shaped towers, which tell of old traditions, passions and visions. Russian and Ukrainian protagonists fill the stories, which encompass this unique culture and architecture, time and again with their warmth, their love and a good portion of humor. They proudly present the old Russian legacy that during the World War and in the old Soviet Union days, constantly threatened to disappear.

programme.title: The Oceans Seven
programme.desc: André Wiersig, born in 1972, has achieved what no German has ever done before: he has swum through the world's seven most famous straits, the so-called Ocean's Seven. To prepare for it, he chose a familiar but hostile environment. In his carport, he hardened himself in a rain barrel filled with groundwater.

programme.title: North Macedonia: Between Traditional Dances and Mini Navy
programme.desc: Northern Macedonia emerged from being a once constituent republic of the former Yugoslavia. Anyone wishing to discover unknown worlds has every chance of finding them in this young Balkan country, full of imposing mountains, lakes of crystal-clear water, original villages and centuries-old customs. Nevertheless, Northern Macedonia, which borders Serbia in the north and Greece in the south, considered to be one of the poorest countries in Europe.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it's going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don't, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10
programme.desc: On the menu this week it's medieval madness, we've come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world's strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Stage 11
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it's explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I'm shaking because it's Poland, it's powerful, it's strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it's about to get heavy.

programme.title: Stage 12
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Stage 13
programme.desc: It's time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Stage 15
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.
